extension.newMemo.title: stand: New Memo
extension.newMemoFromSelection.title: stand: New Memo from Selection
extension.convertToWorkspace.title: stand: Convert to Workspace
extension.selectMemoDir.title: stand: Select Memo Folder
vscode-stand.memoDir.description: a folder to save memo. Full path is the common root path, relative path is the individual path.
vscode-stand.memoEol.description: Line ending for new memo files (LF or CRLF). Selected text is also converted to this setting.
extension.selectWorkspaceDir.title: stand: Select Workspace Folder
vscode-stand.workspaceDir.description: a folder to save workspace. Full path is the common root path, relative path is the individual path.
vscode-stand.workspaceMainFolder.descrip: Main folder name for multi-root workspaces. (DO NOT edit in user scope)
